description_long: This object is a folding knife with a straight, single-edged blade made of dark metal. The blade is attached to a wooden handle that features a warm brown tone and a smooth, slightly contoured surface for grip. A prominent metal guard is present at the junction between the blade and handle, providing safety during use. The handle also includes a visible metal lever or locking mechanism, likely for folding or securing the blade. The overall design is utilitarian, with no visible decorative elements, and the materials suggest durability and functionality. The knife appears compact and practical, suitable for everyday urban tasks or utility purposes.
description: A compact folding knife with a straight metal blade, wooden handle, and a visible metal guard and lever. The design is utilitarian and functional, with no ornamentation.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the straight blade, wooden handle, and the metal guard and lever.
description_view_1: Front-on view highlighting the narrow profile of the blade and handle, with the lever extending downward.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the blade, handle, and guard, with the lever visible on the left.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the end of the handle and the alignment of the blade and lever.
attribute_handle_design: straight wooden handle, smooth surface, slight contour, metal lever
